department: Lipa City Planning and Development Office

internal_services.service_name: Issuance of Locational Clearance for New Construction, Repair and Improvement of Building
internal_services.office: Lipa City Planning and Development Office
internal_services.image: /assets/document_background/Issuance of Locational Clearance for New Construction, Repair and
internal_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Duly filled-up application form
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Planning and Development Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Building plan, specifications and Bill of Materials – 6 copies
Transfer Certificate of Title
Tax declaration – 2 copies
Barangay Clearance for new construction, repair or renovation – 1 original copy
checklist_of_requirements.source: Respective barangay halls where the property is located

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: If applicant is not the owner of the lot and/ or building (Contract of Lease, Deed of Sale, Contract to Sell, Authorization) – 2 copies
checklist_of_requirements.source: Owner of lot and/ or building (whose name appears on the TCT or tax declaration)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the duly filled-up application form and all the required documents
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive/ review completeness of requirements and application form and record endorsement from Lipa City Engineering Office, attach action slip and forward to PPD; 1.2. Advice the client to return on a specific date; 1.3. Conduct site/ ocular inspection; 1.4. Prepare and sign inspection report; 1.5. Review inspection report, application requirements, note down recommendation and sign inspection report; 1.6. Compute corresponding fees; 1.7. Prepare Order of Payment; 1.8. Sign Order of Payment; 1.9. Issue Order of Payment and advise the applicant to pay at the Lipa City Treasurer’s Office
steps.processing_time: 1 hour and 2 minutes (1 ½ days including waiting time for inspection)
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI, Draftsman II (Zoning Inspector), Zoning Officer III, Planning Officer IV, Assistant City Planning and Development Coordinator, Project Evaluation Officer I

steps.client_step: 2. Review Order of Payment and pay the corresponding fees at the Lipa City Treasurer’s Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk III, Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to Lipa City Planning and Development Office
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Prepare Locational Clearance upon presentation of the receipt and affix initials, prepare endorsement letter to Lipa City Engineering Office and affix initials; 3.2. Review and sign the Locational Clearance, endorsement letter to LCEO and building plans
steps.person_responsible: Economist II, Administrative Aide VI, Planning Officer IV, Assistant City Planning and Development Coordinator, City Planning and Development Coordinator

steps.client_step: 4. Claim the Locational Clearance and sign in the logbook for acknowledgement
steps.agency_action: 4. Release the Locational Clearance to the client and endorse back to Lipa City Engineering Office the building plans
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI

internal_services.service_name: Issuance of Locational Clearance for New Business and Transfer of Business Location
internal_services.image: /assets/document_background/Issuance of Locational Clearance for New Business and Transfer of
internal_services.office: Lipa City Planning and Development Office
internal_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Duly filled-up application form
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Permits and Licensing Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Tax declaration of lot and building – 2 copies
Barangay Clearance for Business – 2 copies
checklist_of_requirements.source: Respective barangays where the business is located

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Developer’s clearance or Homeowner’s Association Clearance (if location is within a subdivision) – 2 copies

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the duly-filled up application form together with all the requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive/ review completeness; 1.2. Advise the client to return; 1.3. Conduct site/ ocular inspection; 1.4. Prepare and sign Inspection Report; 1.5. Review inspection report and sign; 1.6. Compute fees; 1.7. Prepare Order of Payment; 1.8. Sign the Order of Payment; 1.9. Issue the Order of Payment
steps.processing_time: 1 hour and 5 minutes (1 ½ days including waiting time for inspection)
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Draftsman II, Zoning Officer III, Planning Officer IV, Assistant CPDC, Project Evaluation Officer I

steps.client_step: 2. Present the Order of Payment and pay the corresponding fee at the City Treasurer’s Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II (City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa CPDO
steps.agency_action: 3.1 Prepare the Locational Clearance; 3.2 Review and sign the Locational Clearance
steps.person_responsible: Economist II, Administrative Officer IV, Planning Officer IV, Asst. CPDC, CPDC

steps.client_step: 4. Claim the locational clearance and sign in the logbook
steps.agency_action: 4. Release the Locational Clearance and endorse to CEO
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV

internal_services.office: Lipa City Planning and Development Office
internal_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Duly filled-up application form – 1 original copy
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Planning and Development Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Transfer Certificate of Title/s (TCT) or any proof of ownership – 2 photocopies
Tax Declaration – 2 copies
Lot plan with vicinity map if multiple titles

steps.client_step: 1.Submit complete requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Issue form and forward for notation; 1.2. Evaluate application; 1.3. Conduct site inspection; 1.4. Prepare/sign Inspection Report; 1.5. Verify land use and GIS; 1.6. Compute fees; 1.7. Prepare Order of Payment; 1.8. Sign Order of Payment; 1.9. Advise to pay
steps.processing_time: 1 hour and 4 minutes (1 ½ days waiting for inspection)
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Zoning Officer III, Planning Officer III, IT Officer II, Project Evaluation Officer I, CPDC

steps.client_step: 2. Present the Order of Payment and pay at City Treasurer’s Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa CPDO
steps.agency_action: 3.1 Prepare Certification; 3.2 Review; 3.3 Sign Certification; 3.4 Release
steps.person_responsible: Economist II, Planning Officer IV, Asst. CPDC, CPDC, Administrative Aide IV

internal_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Certificate of Completion duly signed and sealed – 6 copies
Certificate of Occupancy
Pictures of the building

steps.client_step: 1. Submit complete requirements to Lipa CPDO
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive/record; 1.2. Conduct inspection; 1.3. Prepare inspection report; 1.4. Verify against Locational Clearance; 1.5. Review report; 1.6. Compute fees; 1.7. Prepare Order of Payment; 1.8. Sign Order of Payment; 1.9. Advise client to pay
steps.processing_time: 46 minutes (1 ½ days waiting for inspection)
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Draftsman II, Economist II, Zoning Officer III, Planning Officer III, Project Evaluation Officer I, Asst. CPDC

steps.client_step: 2. Present Order of Payment and pay at Treasurer’s Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to CPDO
steps.agency_action: 3.1 Sign Certificate for Land Use and Zoning; 3.2 Release Occupancy Certificate
steps.person_responsible: Assistant CPDC, CPDC, Administrative Aide IV

internal_services.office: Lipa City Planning and Development Office
internal_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Letter request addressed to the City Mayor through the City Administrator
Zoning Certification
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Planning and Development Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Vicinity map and lot plan (signed and sealed by Geodetic Engineer) – 2 copies

steps.client_step: 1.Submit complete requirements to Lipa CPDO
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive and record; 1.2. Conduct site inspection; 1.3. Prepare Inspection Report; 1.4. Evaluate application; 1.5. Prepare Zoning Certificate; 1.6. Prepare endorsement letter to City Administrator; 1.7. Sign Zoning Certificate and endorsement
steps.processing_time: 2 hours and 2 minutes to 3 hours and 2 minutes
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Zoning Officer II, Administrative Officer IV, Zoning Officer III, Planning Officer IV, Asst. CPDC, Economist II, CPDC

internal_services.service_name: Approval of Subdivision Development Plan and Issuance of Development Permits
internal_services.image: /assets/document_background/Approval of Subdivision Development Plan and Issuance of Development
internal_services.office: Lipa City Planning and Development Office
internal_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: PALC Requirements: Plan (4 sets), Tax Receipt, Tax Declaration, TCT, Vicinity Map, Lot Plan, Barangay Resolution
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Treasurer, Assessor, Register of Deeds, Barangay

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: DP Requirements: Revised Plan (6 sets), DAR Clearance, BATELEC II Certification, MLWD Certification, NWRB Permit, ECC

steps.client_step: PALC 1. Submit complete requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive/record; 1.2. Evaluate plans; 1.3. Prepare Subdivision Plan Analysis; 1.4. Prepare PALC; 1.5. Compute fees; 1.6. Prepare Order of Payment; 1.7. Sign Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Administrative Officer IV, Zoning Officer III, Project Evaluation Officer I, CPDC

steps.client_step: 2. Pay at Treasurer’s Office and submit OR
steps.agency_action: 2.1. Issue Receipt; 2.2. Review analysis and PALC; 2.3. Approve and sign; 2.4. Release PALC
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II, Planning Officer IV, Asst. CPDC, CPDC, Zoning Officer III

steps.client_step: Final Subdivision Plan Approval 1. Submit revised plan
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Review; 1.2. Prepare Final Analysis; 1.3. Review analysis; 1.4. Approve analysis; 1.5. Prepare recommendation; 1.6. Forward to City Administrator
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer IV, Zoning Officer III, Planning Officer IV, Asst. CPDC, CPDC, Administrative Aide IV

steps.client_step: Issuance of Development Permit 1. Pay and submit OR
steps.agency_action: Process includes computing fees, preparing DP, signing plans, and final release by Mayor
steps.person_responsible: Zoning Officer III, Planning Officer IV, CPDC, City Administrator, City Mayor

internal_services.service_name: Approval of Alteration of Plan Permit
internal_services.office: Lipa City Planning and Development Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Subdivision Plan - 2 sets

steps.client_step: 1.Submit letter request and requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive/record; 1.2. Evaluate plans; 1.3. Prepare Alteration Analysis; 1.4. Review Analysis; 1.5. Approve analysis; 1.6. Prepare recommendation; 1.7. Forward to City Administrator; 1.8. Endorse to SP; 1.9. SP Approval; 1.10. Compute fees; 1.11. Prepare Order of Payment; 1.12. Sign Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Administrative Officer IV, Zoning Officer III, Planning Officer IV, Asst. CPDC, CPDC, Project Evaluation Officer I

steps.client_step: 2. Pay at Treasurer’s Office and submit OR
steps.agency_action: 2.1 Prepare Permit; 2.2 Sign endorsement; 2.3 Forward to Administrator; 2.4 Affix initials; 2.5 Sign Alteration Permit; 2.6 Release
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer IV, Zoning Officer III, CPDC, City Administrator, City Mayor

internal_services.office: Lipa City Planning and Development Office
internal_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business
who_may_avail: Property owners seeking Special Use Permit

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Building plan, TCT, Tax Declaration, Tax Receipt, Letter of Intent, Reclassification Ordinance, Barangay Clearance, Zoning Certification
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Assessor, Treasurer, SP, Barangay, CPDO

steps.client_step: 1. Submit endorsement and records
steps.agency_action: 1.1 Receives and prepares Action Slip
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV

steps.client_step: 2.Fill up Application Form and pay Zoning Fee
steps.agency_action: 2.1 Review land use; 2.2 Forward request; 2.3 Endorse to SP; 2.4 Approve through Ordinance; 2.5 Compute fees; 2.6 Prepare Order of Payment; 2.7 Sign Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Planning Officer IV, Asst. CPDC, CPDC, City Administrator, SP, Zoning Officer III, Project Evaluation Officer I

steps.client_step: 3. Pay at Treasurer’s Office and present OR
steps.agency_action: 3.1 Prepare Permit; 3.3 Forward to Administrator; 3.4 Sign Permit; 3.5 Release
steps.person_responsible: Economist II, Administrative Aide II, City Mayor

internal_services.office: Lipa City Planning and Development Office
internal_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Identification card – 1 original copy
checklist_of_requirements.source: Requesting party or any government agency

steps.client_step: 1.Presents ID and register in Logbook
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Locate materials; 1.2. Issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Project Evaluation Officer II/I, Statistician III

steps.client_step: 2. Pay Secretary’s fee at Treasurer’s Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Free for students, P50.00 for non-students
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II

steps.client_step: 3. Present Official Receipt to CPDO
steps.agency_action: 1.3. Release document
steps.person_responsible: Project Evaluation Officer II/I, Statistician III

internal_services.service_name: Request for Certified True Copy of Documents
internal_services.office: Lipa City Planning and Development Office
internal_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Certified True Copy of Documents
internal_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2G – Government to Government, G2B – Government to Business
who_may_avail: Any individual, company, organization, institution or agency

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Walk-in request

steps.client_step: 1. Proceed to CPDO to make a request
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Validate document; 1.2. Print/photocopy; 1.3. Issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Zoning Officer III, Administrative Aide IV, Project Evaluation Officer I

steps.client_step: 2. Pay at the City Treasurer’s Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II

steps.client_step: 3. Present Receipt to CPDO
steps.agency_action: 1.3. Sign documents
steps.person_responsible: Project Development Officer IV, Project Evaluation Officer IV, Planning Officer IV

steps.client_step: 4. Receive document and sign logbook
steps.agency_action: 4. Release document
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV
